policy.merge_strategy: fetch -> checkout focus branch -> merge configured source branches -> run validation -> push branch -> PR -> auto-merge only after required checks
policy.cleanup_strategy: promote unique files to the owning submodule lane, remove redundant copies only after the promoted copy is verified, and rename files to the canonical lane naming pattern
policy.history_merge_strategy: merge stale branches into the focus branch with normal merge first; if there are no tree changes, record them as history-only candidates instead of blocking fresh optimized work
policy.dashboard_strategy: publish JSON/Markdown artifacts, GitHub step summaries, Pages dashboard data, milestones, labels, and project fields from the governance setup workflow

priority_repositories.name: helios-control
priority_repositories.focus: C# WinUI 3 front end, control dashboards, accessibility, UI-state cleanup
promotion_rules: copy unique files into canonical lane paths before deleting old copies
preserve git history through branch merges before cleanup commits
skip destructive cleanup when validation fails

priority_repositories.name: hermes-fleet-production
priority_repositories.focus: Hermes fleet production, XCore orchestration, performance back end, deployment hardening
promotion_rules: copy unique files into canonical lane paths before deleting old copies
preserve git history through branch merges before cleanup commits
skip destructive cleanup when validation fails

labels.ai-autofix: Automated AI candidate fix or optimization
labels.stale-history: Branch or module history cleanup candidate
